author: nigecat
description: Embed Desmos graphs into your notes.

manifest.author: Nigecat
manifest.description: Embed Desmos graphs into your notes
manifest.name: Desmos

name: Desmos

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
# Features
* Allow hiding equation lines (#118)
* Improve graph caching (#119)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
# Features
* Update Desmos API to v1.9 (#115)
* Allow logarithmic scales using `xAxisLogarithmic` and `yAxisLogarithmic` (#116)
* Significantly reduce distribution size

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Features
* Add legacy API toggle (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/94)

## Bug Fixes
* Fix 'hidden' equation flag being ignored (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/93)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Features
* Add support for axis labels (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/76)
* Allow expressions in graph bounds (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/89)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Features
* Allow using default label values (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/72)
* Allow hiding axis numbers (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/73)

## Bug Fixes
* Disallow duplicate graph settings (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/66)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Features
* Apply 'desmos-graph' css class to graph element (#57)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Features 
* Support point labels (#48)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
 - Fix incorrect hex code parsing

## Changes
 - Caching now uses svg render (instead of png render)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Features
* Allow user to specify degree mode for graph (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/42)
* Allow user to set default line color (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/43)

Additionally, this release rewrites the internal graph parser (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/41), this should cause no external changes.

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
* Fix purple constant not being purple (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/40)
* Fix LaTeX control characters not being escaped properly

## Features
* Allow individual equations to be hidden (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/35)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Bug fixes
* Allow spaces around graph fields (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/32)
* Allow f-prime syntax for function derivatives (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/34)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
* Allow fields to contain float values (https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/pull/31)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
* Fix graph bounds not adjusting for equal boundary (#27)
* Allow rendering empty graphs (#26)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
* Make graph bounds dynamically change to avoid rendering an invalid graph (#22)

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Added support for hiding the graph grid with `grid=false`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/compare/0.5.2...0.5.3

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description: Fix tag version for Obsidian. This release has no changes.

releases.author: Nigecat
releases.description:
This release adds full mobile (and web) support and fixes several minor bugs.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nigecat/obsidian-desmos/compare/v0.4.15...v0.5.1
